headline: Dollar strength risks yen carry trade blowup
detail: A sudden yen strengthening forces leveraged carry positions to unwind fast, triggering broad risk-off selling. Your book is nearly 90% tech and you hold three leveraged ETFs - SOXL, SPAL, QQQI - which would take the first and hardest hits in a vol spike. This is the single biggest macro tail risk to your specific portfolio right now.
rec: No new trade triggered, but this is a reason to tighten stops on SOXL (already below your $200 stop) and SPAL ($21.38 stop is close). Don't add leveraged exposure until dollar/yen stabilizes.

headline: Tesla sinking despite blowout delivery numbers
detail: When a major tech name sells off on good news, it signals the market is looking for reasons to sell, not buy. Your QQQ and SMH holdings both have indirect exposure to big-cap tech sentiment, and this kind of reaction can spread. It reinforces a risk-off tone for your sector concentration.
rec: No action needed today, but if QQQ breaks toward its $670 stop or SMH toward $540, those are your lines in the sand - respect them, don't hope.

headline: Labor force participation at 50-year low outside Covid
detail: Weakening labor data raises recession probability, which historically compresses valuations on high-multiple tech and chip names - exactly your book. Combined with dollar strength, this adds to a risk-off macro backdrop that makes margin concentration more dangerous.
rec: This headline is a reason to avoid adding new positions today, not a specific trade trigger. Hold your SPY and QQQ stops as written and let the macro picture clarify before pressing.

headline: GE Vernova winning from AI boom beyond gas turbines
detail: AI infrastructure build-out is broadening - power and energy names are benefiting alongside semis. This is a mild positive read-through for SMH and SOXL as it confirms AI capex demand is real and expanding. Not a buy signal today given macro headwinds, but supportive of the sector thesis longer term.
rec: No action today - macro carry-trade risk outweighs this positive. If risk-off clears and SMH holds above $540, the AI demand story gives a fundamental reason to hold or add SMH; scanner has no current setup for it so wait for a cleaner entry.
